zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus於大約1426年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs27歲，母親Lady Anne of Montgomerie27歲。他於1445年1月16日與Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1488年6月11日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus于大约1426年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs27岁，母亲Lady Anne of Montgomerie27岁。他于1445年1月16日与Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1488年6月11日在苏格兰斯林史爾享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus was born about 1426, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs, was 27 and his mother, Lady Anne of Montgomerie, was 27. He married Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes on 16 January 1445, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 11 June 1488, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus est né environ 1426, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne of Montgomerie, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes le 16 janvier 1445, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1488, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus um 1426 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs 27 und seine Mutter Lady Anne of Montgomerie 27. Er hat am 16. Januar 1445 in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 11. Juni 1488 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus è nato il circa 1426 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne of Montgomerie, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes il 16 gennaio 1445, nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 11 giugno 1488, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmausが約1426年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaursは27歳，母Lady Anne of Montgomerieは27歳であった。1445年1月16日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズでLady Margaret Hepburn of Hailesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1488年6月11日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで63歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus(이)가 대략 1426년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne of Montgomerie(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1445년 1월 16일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1488년 6월 11일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

mn.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kin: Kilmaurs, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus nasceu aproximadamente 1426, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne of Montgomerie, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes em 16 de janeiro de 1445, em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1488, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus родился около 1426 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne of Montgomerie, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes 16 января 1445 г. в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 11 июня 1488 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Cunningham 1st Lord Kilmaus nació aproximadamente 1426, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Cunningham Lord of Kilmaurs, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Anne of Montgomerie, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Hepburn of Hailes el 16 de enero de 1445, en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 11 de junio de 1488, en Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.
